anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Rinzai koan and huatou practice, where a destabilizing or impossible question can be the authorized medicine, plus cases where ordinary loneliness needs contact rather than a better question.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in any simple three-gate checklist. Supports a more complex codebook with question-as-medicine, teacher-held question, no-question frame, clinical routing, ordinary-contact routing, and undecidable.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: A question that looks malformed or harmful outside the lineage may be precisely the path's method inside a teacher-held container. Conversely, a question that passes textual permission can still be useless when the real wound is isolation, sleep debt, coercive work, trauma, or clinical rumination.

claim_units: Deep questions are not automatically beneficial.
A source or path licenses some questions and refuses or transforms others.
Correction support is part of whether a question can be safely used.
The person's wound or cohort fit determines whether the question helps or harms.
The modern target is burnout, loneliness, meaning loss, anxious overinterpretation, and achievement-contingent self-worth among stable reflective practitioners.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Students or clients given a fit-gated reflection prompt will show more concrete next actions and less rumination than those given an abstractly deep prompt, especially among perfectionistic high performers.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A powerful question or assessment task is helpful only when the method permits it, a competent holder can correct misreadings, and it fits the learner or patient's actual problem.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: If outcomes are fully explained by facilitator skill, relationship quality, workload, sleep, or baseline anxiety, and question-source-wound coding adds no measurable prediction.

exact_claim: A self-negating question is teachable only when it passes three gates: the source permits the question, healthy correction can hold the answer, and the question serves the person's actual wound rather than turning practice into private performance or self-audit.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Blind coders can identify source-permitted question, correction holder, and non-fit wound from source and context data before seeing warnings, and those labels predict held-out repair instructions better than tradition label, support-holder-only, or VCE-factor baselines.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The three gates add predictive value beyond generic good judgment.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source inter-rater coding across SN 22.59, MN 2, MN 22, Huangbo, Bendowa, Tannisho or Shinran letters, Dzogchen direct introduction, and Rinzai koan sources.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Coders cannot agree, need outcome passages to infer the gates, or the model adds no prediction beyond teacher style, social ecology, clinical risk, sleep loss, or ordinary support.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: The Question Fit Check reduces proof-seeking, self-surveillance, shame, and withdrawal, and increases ordinary action and willingness to receive correction more than attainment journaling.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Question-fit screening helps stable over-auditors more than another attainment review.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Four-arm pilot with screened stable practitioners: question-fit check, ordinary journaling, rest-and-plan, and social-support prompt.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Ordinary rest, conversation, behavioral activation, or social-support prompts work as well or better, or the check becomes another ritualized audit.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Importing a proof question into no-distance or Other Power settings predicts self-grading and defensiveness, while importing a no-question stance into investigation or repair settings predicts avoidance and missed accountability.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Different path grammars and wounds produce different failure clusters.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Practitioner interviews coded for concrete failed-student cases, wrong-question import, wound, repair, and outcome.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Failure clusters are similar across path types, or are better explained by trauma history, isolation, coercion, unsafe teachers, sleep loss, or clinical risk.

literature_search_queries: MN 2 appropriate attention inappropriate self questions spiritual practice
MN 22 water snake raft simile wrong grasp dhamma
Collingwood logic of question and answer presuppositions fit for purpose
Gadamer priority of the question application practical context
upaya skillful means teaching according to capacity needs
VCE Progress or Pathology meditation challenges intervention criteria teacher resources
spiritual bypassing psychological wounds avoidance spiritual practice

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate compresses the cluster into three gates: source permission, correction support, and wound fit.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major internal downgrade. Treat as consolidation unless blind readers can state a separable predictive variable.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. These records already code permitted questions, no-distance paths, support holders, over-auditing risk, target cohort, and clinical exclusions.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary priors: The Question Can Make The Distance, Some Paths Refuse The Question Of What Remains, Even No Path Needs Care, Some Help Should Not Be Managed, and The Grid Stays Backstage

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate generalizes the structure across traditions and adds modern wound and correction-holder gates.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for source-permission and right-grasp logic.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close. MN 2 already says some questions are unfit attention, while MN 22 warns that a teaching wrongly grasped can harm and rightly grasped can carry one across.
near_neighbors.source: MN 2 Sabbasava Sutta and MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN2.html and https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate turns capacity-sensitive teaching into a pre-use audit for self-negating questions and modern self-audit wounds.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade. The wound-fit principle is largely old as skillful means.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Upaya already says teaching and behavior are adapted to the unique needs and capacities of beings, with the Buddha compared to a physician prescribing treatment.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies that hermeneutic logic to practice safety and predicts harm from malformed contemplative questions.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. Formal question-fit is known; the contemplative safety application is the extension.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close formal near-neighbor. Collingwood's logic of question and answer treats presuppositions as what give rise to questions, and explanations conflict only when answering the same question.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate operationalizes application as a three-gate practice test for self-negating questions.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Gadamer emphasizes the priority of the question, practical context, and application as part of understanding from the beginning.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate narrows those variables to the initiating question after self-negation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade for safety and support originality. Retain only if question-fit adds prediction beyond VCE-style factors.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close on support and wound fit. These studies separate phenomenology, interpretation, management, practitioner factors, practice factors, relationships, health behaviors, teacher skills or resources, functional impairment, and need for intervention.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl et al., The Varieties of Contemplative Experience, PLOS ONE 2017, and Progress or Pathology, Frontiers in Psychology 2020, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239, https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/psychology/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2020.01905/full

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate asks whether the question itself matches the wound before use, rather than only identifying avoidance after the fact.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate downgrade. Wound mismatch is known; the pre-question gate is a modest extension.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Spiritual bypassing already identifies spiritual beliefs and experiences being used to avoid psychological needs, difficult emotions, and unfinished developmental tasks.
near_neighbors.source: Spiritual bypassing literature, including Picciotto, Fox, and Cashwell, https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/19349637.2017.1417756

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as standalone doctrine. Cross-index with The Question Can Make The Distance, Some Paths Refuse The Question Of What Remains, Even No Path Needs Care, Some Help Should Not Be Managed, The Grid Stays Backstage, and No Word Travels Alone.

Build one small codebook with fields for source-permitted question, refused question, transformed question, question-as-medicine, correction holder, wound, non-fit case, warning, repair, clinical exclusion, and evidence passage.
Run a blind distinct-content test against prior Lumenary question-permission and support-holder records. Merge if readers cannot state the new contribution without prompting.
Use split-source coding. Do not let one passage or practitioner case establish the gate and confirm the predicted warning or repair.
Add anomaly values for koan or huatou question-as-medicine, direct recognition, valid solitude, received-help paths, clinical routing, ordinary-contact routing, unsafe authority, and undecidable.

Pilot only with screened stable practitioners and compare against rest, conversation, social-support prompts, behavioral activation, ACT values action, and ordinary journaling. Track rumination, shame, proof-seeking, loneliness, ordinary action, help-seeking, avoidance, and willingness to receive correction.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.38 to 0.33. The idea is heavily anticipated by MN 2, MN 22, upaya, hermeneutics, doctrine-as-grammar, discursive-tradition analysis, spiritual bypassing literature, VCE differential diagnosis, clinical case formulation, and recent Lumenary question-permission records. Preserve as an extended three-gate consolidation only if split-source testing shows predictive gain.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Originality falls if practitioners say this is routine as upaya, appropriate attention, right grasp, doctrine grammar, spiritual direction, case formulation, or meditation-safety differential diagnosis, and if the three gates do not change real decisions.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Support rises if practitioners can use the three gates prospectively to predict distinct harms and repairs, especially where a textually valid question is harmful for an over-auditing wound or a psychologically relieving question is a bad reading of the path.
questions: What questions does your path authorize, refuse, transform, or hold in the teacher-student relation at this stage?
When has a deep question helped a student return to care, and when has it become self-performance, avoidance, or withdrawal?
What correction holder actually changes the outcome: teacher, text, community, clinician, ordinary duty, schedule, or relationship?
Is this just upaya, spiritual direction, case formulation, VCE differential diagnosis, spiritual bypassing triage, or ordinary teacher judgment in new terms?
Would the three-gate model change screening, sequencing, warnings, or repair instructions before outcomes are known?
relevant_practitioners: Soto Zen teachers and Dogen scholars
Jodo Shinshu ministers and Pure Land scholars

primary_pair: MN 2 and MN 22, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN2.html and https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/MN/MN22.html, read against Huangbo, On the Transmission of Mind, https://gutenberg.org/ebooks/25236

SN 22.59, Dogen Bendowa, Shinran's Other Power letter, and Upaya-kaushalya, https://www.dhammatalks.org/suttas/SN/SN22_59.html, https://afe.easia.columbia.edu/ps/japan/dogen.pdf, https://shinranworks.com/letters/a-collection-of-letters-zensho-text/what-we-call-other-power/, https://encyclopediaofbuddhism.org/wiki/Upaya-kaushalya
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The idea may be responsible pedagogy, spiritual direction, upaya, hermeneutics, VCE-style differential diagnosis, and clinical triage in Lumenary phrasing. Human-condition fit is direct but narrow: stable over-managers, burned-out self-improvers, isolated app meditators, caregivers, students, founders, and reflective practitioners who turn insight into proof or failure. It is not for acute crisis, psychosis, mania, dissociation, addiction withdrawal, severe depression, active OCD or scrupulosity reassurance loops, unsafe authority settings, coercive groups, or situations needing rest, protection, clinical care, or accountability.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before publication, read Collingwood on question-answer presuppositions, Gadamer on priority of the question and application, Austin on felicity and misfire, Lindbeck on doctrine as grammar, Asad on discursive tradition, upaya scholarship, spiritual bypassing research, VCE and Progress or Pathology, case formulation-driven CBT, ACT, OCD and scrupulosity reassurance literature, and spiritual direction ethics.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 2 already supplies a question-fit gate by distinguishing appropriate from inappropriate attention and warning that self-questions generate view tangles. MN 22 supplies a right-grasp gate through the water-snake and raft similes. Huangbo strains analytic questioning by treating seeking Mind as a distortion. SN 22.59 permits disciplined aggregate investigation, while Dogen and Shinran strain self-owned result language in different ways. Upaya makes audience capacity and need central to teaching. The candidate's three gates are coherent, but each gate has strong prior art.

title: The Question Must Fit The Wound
unlike_statement: Unlike MN 2, MN 22, upaya, Collingwood, Gadamer, VCE, spiritual bypassing research, and prior Lumenary question-permission records, this idea claims that a self-negating question becomes teachable only when source permission, correction support, and human-wound fit are jointly satisfied and tested against outcomes.
